stemHtml: Compared to a centrifugal compressor, an axial compressor…

options.a: Has a lower pressure ratio and an inability to compress a high mass of air.
options.b: Has a lower pressure ratio and the ability to compress a high mass of air.
options.c: Has a higher pressure ratio and the ability to compress a high mass of air.
options.d: Has a higher pressure ratio and an inability to compress a high mass of air.
